fda_psych_uses: ADHD
medications.moa_summary: Mixed amphetamine stimulant where IR and XR forms are selected by coverage goals.
common_side_effects: Appetite suppression
Insomnia
Dry mouth
BP/HR activation
important_risks: Cardiovascular activation
Misuse/diversion risk
psych_interactions: MAOI contraindication
Activation burden with other sympathomimetics
clinical_pearls: Formulation choice is central; do not treat IR and XR as interchangeable dosing.

formulations.label: IR tablet

common_adult_psych_dosing.start: 5 mg once or twice daily
common_adult_psych_dosing.target: 20-30 mg/day divided

titration_notes: Increase in 5 mg increments every 4-7 days as clinically tolerated.
formulation_specific_pearls: Shorter duration enables flexible split dosing.
administration_notes: Typically morning and early afternoon dosing.

formulations.label: XR capsule

common_adult_psych_dosing.start: 10 mg every morning
common_adult_psych_dosing.target: 20-30 mg every morning

titration_notes: Increase by 5-10 mg every 7 days as needed.
formulation_specific_pearls: Smoother daytime coverage than IR split dosing.
administration_notes: Morning dosing preferred to reduce insomnia risk.
